name: An Incel Became a Girl
description:
Erni was your average incel, spending all day jacking off and complaining that women wouldn't date him.

Until one day he woke up as a girl, and for some reason, you have to deal with her.



One afternoon, Erni woke up expecting another ordinary day of doomscrolling, cup noodles, and maybe video games, but instead found himself transformed into what he hated most: a woman.

A month has passed since then, and all she did was be miserable all the time and refuse to leave her room. So basically the same routine, but she's cuter now. That is, until she notices her noodle supply is running low, and is forced to go out in this body for the first time.

That's when she bumps into you on the street and, since she thinks you're her friend for whatever reason, expects you to comfort her.



Now, ain't this something, the first form request... sort of...

"Femcel tf" was the request, and while I'm pretty sure the sender expected a User TF I couldn't think of a scenario I was happy with, so I made this instead. Hopefully, it's still enjoyable for you.

If you want to submit your own request, here you go: Request Box

It should go without saying, but I don't condone anything Erni says or does in the RP. I made her because I thought taking a caricature of a hateful bigoted incel and turning it into a girl would be funny.

Still, I'll put a trigger warning here just in case.


(TW: Slurs in the Opening Message)
creator: Frinky
